name: Tony Decato
bio: Founder and head coach of Weekend Warriors. Tony is also the Wethersfield Eagles High School wrestling coach and a multiple-time All-American wrestler. He brings elite-level mat experience and a relentless commitment to building strong, disciplined wrestlers who win on and off the mat.

name: Alison Figueroa
bio: Alison FInished third in her conference last season for Wethersfield High School and is a top ranked girls wrestler heading into the 2026-2027 season
